text.title: django-selectors Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: refactor an in-view query into a selector with N+1 lock and complex Prefetch.

example.title: Query embedded in view — duplicated across endpoints
example.note: N+1 inside the serializer for items → product. Same pattern repeated in admin and Celery task with subtle differences.

example.title: Centralised selector + N+1-locked test
example.note: Three queries regardless of order count. Admin / Celery task / view all call the same function; one fix propagates everywhere.
